query: Break this approved PRD into implementation issues and open them in dependency order.
Turn this implementation plan into independently grabbable GitHub issues, and show me the breakdown before you publish anything.
Break this PRD into thin vertical slices with blocker relationships and mark which ones need human review.
Use the current issue and repo context to draft issue bodies for the next implementation wave, but leave them as ready-to-paste markdown.
Write the PRD for this feature before we decide how to split the work.
Produce a structured markdown handoff for planning and review instead of tracker tickets.
Explore the repository first because the architecture is still unclear.
Rewrite this under-specified ask before deciding whether tickets should exist yet.
